summary: Re-tested the 3 backend fixes from iteration_27 + light frontend deep-flow on QuotationBuilder. All 3 fixes verified PASS via pytest (20 tests; 18 pass, 2 unrelated LLM-budget 502 failures). Frontend: builder loads cleanly, tax-mode auto-detect banner shown, Conditions tab (37 checkboxes) and Preview tab (Grand Total rendered) work. Sales sidebar correctly hides 'Company Profile' and 'Conditions Library' nav. Backend RBAC blocks sales writes (403).

minor.issue: Both return 502 due to LLM provider budget exhausted (litellm.BadRequestError 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.436, Max budget: 0.401'). External infra issue, NOT a regression. Out of scope per request, but should be flagged to ops.

issues: Sales sidebar correctly hides these links, but direct URL navigation as sales_executive still renders the page UI (backend PUT correctly returns 403 so no data is mutated). Recommend a frontend route-guard / 403 banner to match the sidebar hiding.

action_items: Top-up LLM provider budget (or rotate key) — /ai/suggest-items and /ai/extract-rfq are returning 502 due to 'Budget has been exceeded'. Not a code bug.

(Optional/nice-to-have) Add frontend route guard on /app/admin/company-profile and /app/admin/conditions so sales_executive sees a 403/Not Authorized page instead of the form (the form is read-only-effectively because PUT/DELETE return 403, but UX is misleading).
critical_code_review_comments: Fix-1 (router.py:184-198): Now correctly pops both 'id' and '_id' from payload before $set — no more Mongo write conflict. Verified PUT 200 + persistence + restore in test_update_company_profile.

Fix-2 (rbac.py:246-255): Two new permission rows 'company_profile' (write: super_admin/director/general_manager) and 'condition_library' (write incl. sales_executive; delete super_admin/director). Endpoints in quotation_builder_router.py correctly switched to these keys. Verified: sales_executive blocked on PUT company-profile (403) and DELETE condition (403); sales CAN POST/PUT a condition (verified separately in pytest fixtures).

Fix-3 (quotation_calc.py recalc_quotation): tax_mode_locked flag now honored — when True keeps stored mode; when False/absent re-derives from company_state vs client_state. New pytest test_tax_mode_locked_honored validates both branches (forced 'inter' with same states stays 'inter'; unlocking flips back to 'intra').

success_rate.backend: 90% (18/20; 2 failures are LLM-budget infra, not regressions)

seed_data_creation: One TEST_ quotation (QTN-2026-0010) reused from previous iteration (now status=won). Transient TEST_ conditions auto-cleaned. Company profile city restored after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration_27 bugs are FIXED and verified. Note tab name in builder is 'Services & Line Items' (not 'Sections' as written in the request). The opened builder URL was a WON quote (locked) so Add-Section was hidden — frontend behavior correct. To exercise Add-Section deep flow, create a fresh draft quote first or pick a draft row in the table. Preset-item population via Add-Section dialog was therefore not visually re-verified in this run, but backend POST /quotation-builder with PRESET_ITEMS payload works (test_create_returns_quote_number with grand_total > 0).
rca of the issue: Not applicable — this iteration is regression-verification only. All 3 bugs from iteration_27 are confirmed fixed.
